Plot an SBS1536 catalog as a 2x3 heatmap grid using ggplot2

Source: R/plot_SBS1536.R
plot_SBS1536.Rd

Creates a 2x3 grid of 16x16 heatmaps (one per mutation type: C>A, C>G, C>T, T>A, T>C, T>G) using geom_tile() with a white-to-forestgreen color gradient. Axis labels show colored bases (A, C, G, T).

Usage

plot_SBS1536(
  catalog,
  plot_title = NULL,
  base_size = 11,
  title_cex = 1.2,
  axis_label_cex = 0.8,
  panel_label_cex = 1
)

Arguments

catalog

Numeric vector, single-column data.frame, matrix, tibble, or data.table.

plot_title

Character. Title displayed at the top center.

base_size

Numeric. Base font size in points.

title_cex

Numeric. Multiplier for the plot title size.

axis_label_cex

Numeric. Multiplier for axis base labels.

panel_label_cex

Numeric. Multiplier for panel mutation type labels.

Value

A ggplot object (assembled via patchwork or gridExtra).
